title: Customer Profitibility Analysis
problem: Analyzed customer transaction data to understand purchasing behavior and applied segmentation techniques to identify high-value customer groups and business growth opportunities.
insights: Performed EDA to uncover trends in revenue, order frequency, and customer spending patterns.
Built a K-Means clustering model to segment customers into 4 distinct groups based on behavioral features.
Identified high-value loyal customers driving the majority of revenue and one-time high spenders with strong conversion potential.
Enabled targeted business strategies such as customer retention, remarketing, and personalized promotions.

title: Insurance Customer Behavior and Conversion Analysis
problem: Analyzed an insurance dataset to understand customer behavior, engagement patterns, and factors influencing lead conversion and revenue generation.
insights: Identified strong relationship between customer engagement (website visits, inquiries, quotes) and conversion probability.
Found that higher credit score customers exhibit higher conversion rates.
Built and deployed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time prediction of conversion probability and expected revenue, enabling data-driven decision making.

title: AI-Assisted Web Development and SEO Optimization
problem: Developed and optimized the official website of Haryana Chess Association to improve visibility, automate operations, and enhance user experience.
insights: Built and deployed the official website using AI-assisted development and prompt engineering, generating optimized frontend code.
Implemented SEO strategies that improved search rankings.
Automated certificate generation using Python, processing 1000+ certificates and reducing manual workload.

title: Statistical Quality Analysis for Manufacturing Process Improvement
problem: Analyzed manufacturing data to evaluate production accuracy, identify process variations, and improve overall product quality and reliability.
insights: Conducted statistical quality analysis on threaded tubes (Ø16.3×0.9mm, M15×1×20mm) to assess manufacturing precision and defect patterns.
Applied 7QC tools for defect identification, process monitoring, and quality evaluation.
Performed root cause analysis in collaboration with engineering teams to identify sources of process variation.
Improved process consistency through continuous monitoring and data-driven quality control methods.
